title: Save
excerpt: Save is the shorthand rules-reference term for a saving throw. When an effect calls for a save, resolve it through the full saving throw rules.
markdown: # Save A save is shorthand for a Saving Throw. When an effect says a creature makes, succeeds on, or fails a save, resolve that instruction through Saving Throws as a kind of d20 Test, using the relevant modifier, proficiency, and DC.
